bits.premise: Upright hair can look like static from sex with balloons.
A hunched posture can look like a chicken pecking.
Looking like two celebrities can imply unwanted celebrity parentage.
A sexual animal comparison can be undercut by hemorrhoids.
Hemorrhoids can make bathroom strain look like a horror-movie crawl.

lines.text: Hello, I know I look like I just fucked a pair of balloons.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I've also been known to look like a chicken
lines.label: setup

lines.text: that just got done pecking the ground,
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: is what it is, man.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: No guys, really, I just wanted to come out here
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and acknowledge the fact that I am the unwanted love child
lines.label: setup

lines.text: of Uncle Laser and Ellen DeGeneres.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Just the ultimate gay baby.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: It's been years, they refuse to contact me.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: So I actually moved down here from Utah to get in touch.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But I kinda got distracted guys.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: A lot of just amazing Latina women here.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: To all my Latina women, I am like a baboon under the sheets.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Brutal hemorrhoids guys.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: It's, it's.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Have you guys ever seen the ring?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Specifically the scene where the ghost lady
lines.label: setup

lines.text: is like crawling out of the TV?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That's me on the share dude.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I am just grunting, sweating.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Like an NFL linebacker, dude.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: It is, it's quite the sight.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Thank you guys.
lines.label: fluff
